'''chahama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kynological|kynological]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-h-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kynological|kynological]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chahama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæhæmæth|chæhæmæth]] || [[word:chæhæmæj|chæhæmæj]] || [[word:chæhæmæsh|chæhæmæsh]] || [[word:chæhæmæ|chæhæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chahahamath|chahahamath]] || [[word:chahahamaj|chahahamaj]] || [[word:chahahamash|chahahamash]] || [[word:chahahama|chahahama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chahamath|chahamath]] || [[word:chahamaj|chahamaj]] || [[word:chahamash|chahamash]] || [[word:chahama|chahama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chahafmath|chahafmath]] || [[word:chahafmaj|chahafmaj]] || [[word:chahafmash|chahafmash]] || [[word:chahafmaf|chahafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chahamatha|chahamatha]] || [[word:chahamaja|chahamaja]] || [[word:chahamasha|chahamasha]] || [[word:chahamaka|chahamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chahamath|chahamath]] || [[word:chahamaj|chahamaj]] || [[word:chahamash|chahamash]] || [[word:chahama|chahama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chahamathal|chahamathal]] || [[word:chahamajal|chahamajal]] || [[word:chahamashal|chahamashal]] || [[word:chahamakal|chahamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chahamathatha|chahamathatha]] || [[word:chahamajaja|chahamajaja]] || [[word:chahamashasha|chahamashasha]] || [[word:chahamaka|chahamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chahamathan|chahamathan]] || [[word:chahamajan|chahamajan]] || [[word:chahamashan|chahamashan]] || [[word:chahamakan|chahamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chahamathaoro|chahamathaoro]] || [[word:chahamajaoro|chahamajaoro]] || [[word:chahamashaoro|chahamashaoro]] || [[word:chahamakaoro|chahamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
